articles.title_en: Russia strikes Dnipro with missiles, injuring 18
articles.lead_en: Russian forces struck Dnipro with missiles overnight on May 18, damaging apartment buildings, private homes, a religious institution, a university, and an industrial facility, said Oleksandr Hanzha, the head of the regional military administration.

articles.title_en: Prisoner from the Armed Forces of Ukraine: those mobilized in Ukraine committed suicide at the training ground
articles.lead_en: According to Oleg Zhuk, after arriving at the position, he immediately decided to escape and surrender to Russian troops

articles.title_en: Battle on the Neva: what kind of maneuver helped the Baltic Fleet win the first victory in its history?
articles.lead_en: Taking advantage of the poor visibility, the Russian boats broke through the enemy artillery and boarded their ships. Peter the Great himself led the operation against the Swedes
articles.title_raw: Бой на Неве: что за маневр помог Балтийскому флоту одержать первую победу в своей истории?
articles.lead_raw: Воспользовавшись плохой видимостью, русские лодки прорвались мимо артиллерии противника и взяли его суда на абордаж. Руководил операцией против шведов сам Петр Великий

articles.lead_en: The military man also said that after the loss of the settlement, the enemy tried to attack Russian equipment
